props.title: The Source Files Are Markdown Now

props.text: Anthropic shipped Agent Skills (SKILL.md) in Oct 2025 and open-sourced the spec in Dec. Sixteen frameworks adopted it in three months.

The piece traces the format back to Knuth's 1984 literate programming idea — and uses Aeon's 103 markdown skills, markdown memory, and self-rewriting agent loop to show what happens when the README becomes the runtime.

props.title: The Source Files Are Markdown Now
